entries.clue: Deity a dog rolls over for (3)
entries.parse: DOG reversed by 'rolls over' = GOD; a deity. Surface: a dog rolls over on command.

entries.clue: Cretins, foolishly, paddling in the water tank (7)
entries.parse: (CRETINS)* (foolishly) = CISTERN, the water tank — idiots wading in it.

entries.clue: Cover absolutely everything (7)
entries.parse: Double definition: a BLANKET = a cover, and BLANKET = total, covering absolutely everything (a blanket ban).

entries.clue: When trains run late, somehow I stay impartial (7)
entries.parse: (RUN LATE)* with 'somehow' = NEUTRAL, impartial.

entries.clue: It catches a whisper and grows on a cob (3)

wordplay.fodder: It catches a whisper / grows on a cob

entries.parse: Double definition: an ear catches a whisper (the organ that hears), and an ear grows on a cob (of corn). Both halves read as one description of the same thing.

entries.clue: Old banger lurking in Madagascar (3)
entries.parse: Hidden in 'MadagasCAR' = CAR; an old banger (informal for a car).

entries.clue: Firm and fashionable money (4)
entries.parse: CO (firm) + IN (fashionable) = COIN; money.

entries.clue: Hunger to carve up a roast (5)
entries.parse: Anagram (up) of CARVE gives CRAVE, to hunger for.

entries.clue: Cook rotas, surprisingly (5)
entries.parse: Anagram (indicated by 'surprisingly') of ROTAS = ROAST; to cook.

entries.clue: Fruit of a romantic evening out (4)
entries.parse: Double definition: a DATE is the sticky fruit, and a DATE is a romantic evening out. The whole phrase reads as one idiom, masking the split.

entries.clue: What's left when ten's knocked over (3)
entries.parse: TEN reversed by 'knocked over' = NET; what's left, the net amount.

entries.clue: Swan gliding past disco bar (3)
entries.parse: Hidden in 'disCO Bar' = COB; a male swan.

entries.clue: Clergyman seen in cheap arson cases (6)
entries.parse: Hidden in chea(P ARSON) cases = PARSON, a clergyman.

entries.clue: Some of the heather's warmth (4)
entries.parse: HEAT is concealed in an unbroken run across 'tHE heATher', flagged by 'Some of'. Definition: warmth.
